produce a structured response

Design Proposal

Use readLatest for structured capture.

  • Prefer Markdown by default.
  • Keep compact text available.
  1. Capture response.
  2. Write report.
const result = await chatgpt.readLatest();
console.log(result.data?.markdown);
Format Use
markdown reports
normalized_text assertions

See the docs1.

Preserve structure.
2/2
